author: Alex S
subject: v2.10.2
body: ## [2.10.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.10.1...v2.10.2) (2018-09-10) ### Bug Fixes * **searchbox:** Add missing color to searchbox input field ([#3086](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3086)) ([62b852a](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/62b852a)), closes [#3075](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3075) * **Stats:** let the widget render on all values ([#3070](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3070)) ([cd8f17e](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/cd8f17e)), closes [#3056](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3056)
